stimulus: To pull off a quintuple twist on the floor, a gymnast must rotate around the vertical axis five full times before landing, a feat once considered impossible. ______blank in 2024, when 19-year-old Mai Tran landed the first quintuple twist—long viewed as the most demanding twisting skill—in a senior international competition, the crowd erupted in disbelief.
stem: Which choice completes the text with the most logical transition?
rationale:
Choice B is the best answer. The first sentence sets up the extreme difficulty of the skill; the second sentence describes the audience's awestruck reaction to its first landing. “Fittingly” signals that the dramatic reaction matches the magnitude of the feat.

Choice A adds, but no parallel point is being added. Choice C contrasts; no contrast is present. Choice D suggests sequence in a list, which doesn't fit.
